name: My Friend, the Enemy
overview: Just what is it to be an orbit with four different poles?  The four different poles — Nick, Wan, Beam, and Wayu — continuously circle around each other, repeatedly clashing and burning in the fire of the collision. However, all four sides are relentless, revelling in the pain and pleasure of hatred and competition... and perhaps, even love.

trailers.title: คู่เวร เร็วๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
